name: BBQ Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from ribs.
2. Place ribs and salt in a 4-quart saucepan or Dutch oven.
3. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
4. Cover; simmer for 1-1/2 to 2 hours, or until tender.
5. Meanwhile, saute onion in oil until tender.
6. Add remaining ingredients and simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Drain ribs.
8. Place on rack in broiler pan or over ash-colored coals on outdoor grill so meat is 6 to 7 inches from heat.
9. Broil for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
10. Baste ribs with sauce; continue broiling about 10 minutes, turning and basting frequently with sauce.
11. Serve with remaining sauce, if desired.
